# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
      name: mySecretVault
      type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
      properties:
        location: eastus
        sku: premium
        tenantId: <your_tenant_id>
        enabledForDeployment: true
        enabledForDiskEncryption: true
        enabledForTemplateDeployment: true
        softDeleteRetentionInDays: 7
        purgeProtectionEnabled: false

    - apiVersion: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/accesspolicies
      name: accessPolicy
      type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/accesspolicies
      dependsOn: [mySecretVault]
      properties:
        tenantId: <your_tenant_id>
        objectId: <application_service_principal_1_object_id>
        rights:
          secrets:
            - get
            - list
        attributes: {}

    - apiVersion: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/accesspolicies
      name: accessPolicy2
      type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/accesspolicies
      dependsOn: [mySecretVault]
      properties:
        tenantId: <your_tenant_id>
        objectId: <application_service_principal_2_object_id>
        rights:
          secrets:
            - get
            - list
        attributes: {}
